query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A monochromatic, sepia-toned image showing a heavily textured surface with scattered light and dark patches. A faint rectangular shape or imprint appears in the upper center area. Dark, amorphous shapes occupy the lower portion of the frame, separated by a narrow vertical line. The overall impression suggests an aged or weathered material with organic irregularities across the surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily degraded, sepia-toned image with extreme intentional blur and dense film grain that obscures almost all detail, creating an abstract composition of light and shadow. A faint, ghostly rectangular imprint lingers in the upper center like a half-erased memory, while dark, indistinct forms sink into the lower portion separated by a thin vertical streak. The muted, faded palette and overwhelming texture evoke atmospheric distress and melancholy, as if peering through scratched, aged film or a fogged window into an unreachable past.
